title: 2026 EOC References
description: Main Google Drive repository containing 2026 EOC directives, situational logs, and operational folders.

title: FO6 - EOC Briefing Main Slides
description: Standard daily briefing presentation deck for FO6 Emergency Operation Center disaster updates.

title: EOC Objectives & Target Highlights
description: Strategic operational objectives, targeted LGUs, and response timeline goals.

title: Virtual EOC Command Center
description: 24/7 virtual Google Meet room for incident command teleconferences and inter-agency coordination.

title: FNIs Allocation Tracker
description: Real-time tracking matrix for Food and Non-Food Items (FNIs) distribution across affected municipalities.

title: FNIs Regional Stockpile Inventory
description: Current stock balances of family food packs, hygiene kits, and raw materials in main logistics hubs.

title: EOC Incident & Resource Intake Form
description: Official intake form for field offices to request emergency relief stockpiles and deployment support.

title: DSWD Disaster Operations Manual
description: Official standard operating procedures, guidelines, protocols, and institutional workflow PDF.

title: Quick Response Team (QRT) Roster
description: Contact numbers, shift duty rosters, and assigned clusters for DSWD QRT personnel.

title: DSWD DROMIC Operations Portal
description: Official Disaster Response Management and Information Center portal for terminal reporting.

title: DOST-PAGASA Tropical Cyclone Monitor
description: Real-time weather forecast, typhoon advisories, and severe flood warnings.

title: NDRRMC Interactive Situation Map
description: National Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council national situational updates.
